description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with two front doors featuring large glass panels, allowing visibility into the interior shelves. The cabinet is constructed from a light oak or similar wood, with a natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The front doors are fitted with two round metallic handles, positioned centrally for easy access. The interior consists of multiple horizontal shelves, ideal for storing books, dishes, or display items. The sides and back are solid wood, while the front glass panels provide a clear view of the contents. The overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, light wood cabinet with glass-paneled double doors and multiple interior shelves, featuring metallic handles and a natural grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors, metallic handles, and visible interior shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood surface with a natural grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid wood panel and no openings.
